name: Easy Oriental Beef Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 inch thick beef top round steak
2 tbsp Each Dry Sherry and Soy Sauce
1 package (16 oz) Frozen Vegetable Mixture (such as broccoli, red peppers, bamboo shoots and straw mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially freeze beef top round steak to firm it up. Cut lengthwise in half. Slice across the grain into thin strips (1/8-inch thick). Reserve.
2. Heat a large frying pan or wok over medium-high heat. Add walnuts and stir-fry 1-2 minutes, or until lightly browned. Reserve.
3. Combine water and cornstarch; stir in sherry and soy sauce. Reserve.
4. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in the same pan over medium-high heat. Add garlic and beef strips (1/2 at a time). Stir-fry for 1 minute. Remove and reserve.
5. Add remaining oil to the same pan. Cook vegetables over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Stir in reserved beef strips. Add the reserved cornstarch mixture. Cook and stir until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens slightly.
7. Serve stir-fry over rice. Sprinkle with reserved walnuts. Makes 4 servings.
Prep Time: 20 minutes
Freezing time: 30 minutes
Cooking time: 12 minutes
